author: Avinash
description: Shows a floating formatting toolbar when you select text: bold, italic, headings 1-6, and multi-color highlighting. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Avinash
manifest.description: Shows a floating formatting toolbar when you select text: bold, italic, headings 1-6, and multi-color highlighting.
manifest.name: Selection Format Toolbar

name: Selection Format Toolbar

releases.author: avinashingit
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Floating toolbar appears when you select text in the editor
- Bold and italic toggles
- Heading levels H1–H6 (click the active level to remove)
- Six highlight colors plus a remove-highlight button
- Selection is preserved after each action so formats can be chained
